active_goal.title: Harden the v0.1.0-alpha candidate toward public-ready release decisions
active_goal.target_claim: A new technical user can rely on committed outside-reader public clone evidence, latest seed status, exact release-candidate bundle metadata, and bounded collaboration/provenance/storage gates without unsupported claims.
active_goal.success_gate: Outside-reader evidence is imported, status/report/release text prefer latest evidence, release decision package is ready without creating a tag, and CI is green without unsupported durability, security, censorship-resistance, SLSA, or production-readiness claims.

autonomous_loop_sequence.goal: Import actual separate-host outside-reader public clone evidence.
Make status/report/release-note output prefer the latest passing outside-reader evidence per seed.
verification: public seed status names Loop 89 evidence rows
bundle report includes latest public seed status

autonomous_loop_sequence.goal: Prepare exact release decision materials without creating a tag or GitHub Release.
verification: release draft includes candidate commit, bundle digest, CI URL, outside-reader evidence, and non-claims
no tag or GitHub Release is created

autonomous_loop_sequence.goal: Refresh or explicitly gate the selected-relay Nostr issue/patch collaboration path.
verification: selected-relay issue/patch evidence remains secret-free and bounded, or exact live replay blocker is documented

autonomous_loop_sequence.goal: Clarify release signing/provenance hardening without production/private keys or unsupported SLSA claims.
verification: no SLSA/security claim unless separately proven

autonomous_loop_sequence.goal: Prepare durable storage and pinning decision gates without spending or paid services.
verification: free local/gateway checks only unless separate approval records cost, key, wallet, and durability boundaries

standing_live_approval.approval_text: For what its worth I am totally ok with live IPFS/Radicle/Nostr/signing actions

approved_live_action_scope.scope: Free/project-scoped IPFS daemon/add/fetch/gateway checks for committed local fixture bytes and CAR/CID evidence.
Disposable/project-scoped Radicle public-network seed/clone/readback checks with temporary state and cleanup.
Low-volume Nostr publish/readback checks using disposable project-scoped keys and public relays.
Disposable or keyless test signing/provenance verification that does not use production/private personal keys.

blocked_without_separate_approval.requires: Separate explicit approval before paid storage, wallets, paid services, or spending.
Separate explicit approval before production/private personal keys are used for any protocol action.
Separate explicit approval before contacting specific people outside public project channels.
Separate explicit approval before persistent public seed operation, background daemons, cron jobs, or always-on services.
Evidence-specific approval and proof before durability, censorship-resistance, security, SLSA, broad availability, or production-readiness claims.
Separate explicit approval before creating a Git tag, GitHub Release, or public announcement outside committed draft docs.
